assignments.name: dateFrom
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate() - 7); return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; })() }}

assignments.name: weekLabel
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const now = new Date(); const start = new Date(now); start.setDate(now.getDate() - 7); return start.toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {day:'2-digit', month:'2-digit'}) + ' – ' + now.toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {day:'2-digit', month:'2-digit', year:'numeric'}); })() }}
